title: Combined water heater and water treatment unit
abstract: The present invention describes a combined water heater and water treatment device 1, said combined water heater and water treatment device comprising a water treatment unit 2 being embedded by a single container 3 of the combined water heater and water treatment device 1, and said combined water heater and water treatment device 1 also comprising a heater element 4 arranged on the outside of the single container 3 of the combined water heater and water treatment device.
claims: Claims Claims 1 . Combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ), said combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ) comprising a water treatment unit (2) being embedded by a single container (3) of the combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ), and said combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ) also comprising a heater element (4) arranged on the outside of the single container (3) of the combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ). 2. Combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ) according to claim 1 , wherein the water treatment unit (2) comprises granulate. 3. Combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ) according to claim 1 , wherein the water treatment unit (2) is a light unit. 4. Combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ) according to claim 3. wherein the light unit is a UV unit. 5. Combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ) according to claim 3 or 4, wherein the light unit is a UV lamp being surrounded by a transparent protective cover and wherein both the UV lamp and the transparent protective cover are removable from the bottom of the single container (3). 6. Combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ) according to any of claims 1 -5, wherein the heater element (4) is one coherent single unit. 7. Combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ) according to any of claims 1 -6, wherein the heater element (4) is embedded in isolation (5). 8. Combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ) according to any of claims 1 -7, wherein the heater element (4) is a film attached to a portion of the outside surface of the single container (3). 9. Combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ) according to any of claims 1 -8, wherein the single container (3) is earthed and is arranged with a thermostat to stop power supply during a a short circuit or overheating. 10. Combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ) according to any of claims 1 -9, wherein an inflow and an outflow of the combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ) is arranged on the side thereof. 1 1 . System (10) allowing for purification and recycling of water or separation of water, said system (10) comprising a combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ) according to any of claims 1 -10 and wherein the combined heater and water treatment device (1 ) is arranged subsequent a water filtration unit (100) in terms of process flow. 12. System (10) according to claim 1 1 , wherein the combined water heater and water treatment device (1 ) is placed in a vertically higher position than the water filtration unit (100).
